prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低录取位次分别为约282名、984名、1036名、1057名、1998名，整体呈持续后移趋势，尤其2025年较2024年后移约941名，波动幅度较大；近3年累计后移约962名，2025年基准位次约1998名；该校在安徽省该科类招生计划2021年17人、2022年23人、2023年26人、2024年31人、2025年35人，连续5年 扩招；2026年计划35人，与2025年持平，扩招趋势暂停，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名主榜中上海交通 大学位列第4，医学院作为其核心组成部分，办学层次极高，对高分考生有持续吸引力；2026年声誉监测显示上海交通大学（校本部）评价偏负面，主要涉及学 校管理与学术不端事件，但医学院相对独立，临床医学专业口碑未受明显冲击；抖音综合热度排名第42（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度保持平稳；临床医学为A+学科（全国顶尖），口腔医学A+，基础医学A-，护理学A-，生物学A+，生物医学工程A；招生专业（临床医学八年制、临床医学五年制、眼视光方向等）均对应A+ 级学科，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业热度持续高位，2024年评估为"推荐"，2023年"高热推荐"（76.03），报考意愿稳定；口腔医学同样为"推荐"（72.31）；安徽省2026年物理类考生估算约31.4万人，较2025年32.1万人略减约2.1%，竞争压力 小幅缓解；该校位于上海市，属一线城市，地域吸引力强；在安徽省招生 占比从2021年5.4%升至2025年7.1%，呈上升趋势，表明该校对安徽考生投放力度加大；本省考生对上海高校偏好明显。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的异常波动、2026年招生计划持平、临床医学专业热度持续高位、安徽省物理类考生总数略减等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年将有小幅回调（位次数字减小，竞争略加剧）。预测最低 位次约1948名，区间1714–2182名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（五年制）/ 医学试验班（临床方向）
- 临床医学（眼视光方向）/ 医学试验班（眼视光方向）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 医学技术类（四年制，含医学检验技术、食品卫生与营养学、医学影像技术、听力与言语康复学）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（1714–2182名）内，建议以二档专业（五年制临床医学、眼视光方向）为主攻目标，一档（八年制本博连读）作为冲刺，三档（医学技术类）作为保底。位次明 显优于区间下限（<1714名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for this subject category were approximately 282, 984, 1036, 1057, and 1998 respectively, showing a continuous backward trend, especially in 2025 with a backward shift of about 941 places compared to 2024, with significant fluctuations; the cumulative backward shift over the past 3 years is about 962 places, with the baseline ranking for 2025 at about 1998; the enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province for this subject category was 17 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 31 in 2024, and 35 in 2025, with continuous expansion for 5 consecutive years; the 2026 plan is 35, unchanged from 2025, pausing the expansion trend, with a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings main list, Shanghai Jiao Tong University ranks 4th, and the School of Medicine, as its core component, has an extremely high educational level, continuously attracting high-scoring students; the 2026 reputation monitoring shows that Shanghai Jiao Tong University (main campus) has a somewhat negative evaluation, mainly involving school management and academic misconduct incidents, but the School of Medicine is relatively independent, and the reputation of the clinical medicine major has not been significantly impacted; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 42nd (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, and stable application attention; clinical medicine is an A+ discipline (top in the country), stomatology is A+, basic medicine is A-, nursing is A-, biology is A+, and biomedical engineering is A; the enrollment majors (clinical medicine eight-year program, clinical medicine five-year program, ophthalmology direction, etc.) all correspond to A+ level disciplines, with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the clinical medicine major remains high, rated as 'Recommended' in 2024 and 'High Heat Recommended' (76.03) in 2023, with stable application willingness; stomatology is also 'Recommended' (72.31); the estimated number of physics category examinees in Anhui Province for 2026 is about 314,000, a slight decrease of about 2.1% from 325,000 in 2025, slightly easing competitive pressure; the university is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal; the proportion of enrollment in Anhui Province has risen from 5.4% in 2021 to 7.1% in 2025, showing an upward trend, indicating increased investment in Anhui candidates; local candidates have a clear preference for Shanghai universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal fluctuation of a significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the sustained high popularity of the clinical medicine major, and the slight decrease in the total number of physics category examinees in Anhui Province, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will see a slight rebound compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases, competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is about 1948, with a range of 1714–2182.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program, Bachelor-Doctor Continuum)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program) / Medical Experimental Class (Clinical Direction)
- Clinical Medicine (Ophthalmology Direction) / Medical Experimental Class (Ophthalmology Direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Medical Technology Category (Four-Year Program, including Medical Laboratory Technology, Food Hygiene and Nutrition, Medical Imaging Technology, Hearing and Speech Rehabilitation)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (1714–2182), it is recommended to target Tier 2 majors (five-year clinical medicine, ophthalmology direction) as the main goal, Tier 1 (eight-year bachelor-doctor continuum) as a stretch, and Tier 3 (medical technology category) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1714), you can focus on aiming for the top Tier 1 flagship major.
